subheadings.heading: Access, Execution & Persistence
subheadings.content:
| Tactic | Technique | Related Section |
|---|---|---|
| **Initial Access** | Phishing, Public Exploit, Supply Chain | [Social Engineering](social-engineering.md) |
| **Execution** | Command Injection, Scripting, User Exec | [Shells](../exploitation/reverse-shells.md) |
| **Persistence** | Web Shell, Account Creation, Scheduled Tasks | [Webshells](../enumeration/web/web-shells.md) |
| **PrivEsc** | Sudo Abuse, DLL Hijacking, Bypass UAC | [Privilege Escalation](../exploitation/privilege-escalation.md) |

subheadings.heading: Defense Evasion & Discovery
subheadings.content:
| Tactic | Technique | Related Section |
|---|---|---|
| **Defense Evasion** | Obfuscation, Process Injection, AMSI Bypass | [RT/EDR Evasion](rt-edr.md) |
| **Credential Access** | OS Dumping, Kerberoasting, Brute Force | [Kerberos](../post-exploitation/windows/ad/kerberos-attacks.md) |
| **Discovery** | Network Scan, AD Enum, Cloud Discovery | [Network Scanning](../recon/network-scanning.md) |
| **Lateral Movement** | Pass-the-Hash, Remote Services, Pivoting | [Pivoting](../post-exploitation/pivoting.md) |

subheadings.heading: Web & Server-Side Attacks
subheadings.content:
| Attack Type | Primary Vulnerabilities | Reference |
|---|---|---|
| **Injections** | SQLi, Command Injection, SSTI, LDAP | [SQLi](../enumeration/web/sqli.md) |
| **Cross-Site** | XSS (Reflected/DOM), CSRF, CORS, Clickjacking | [XSS](../enumeration/web/xss.md) |
| **Server-Side** | SSRF, XXE, LFI/RFI, Deserialization | [SSRF](../enumeration/web/ssrf.md) |
| **Auth/Authz** | IDOR, JWT Attacks, OAuth Flaws, MFA Bypass | [JWT](../enumeration/webservices/jwt.md) |

subheadings.heading: Infrastructure & Infrastructure Attacks
subheadings.content:
| Domain | Key Techniques | Reference |
|---|---|---|
| **Active Directory** | DCSync, Golden Ticket, AD CS Abuse | [AD](../post-exploitation/windows/ad/README.md) |
| **Cloud Security** | IMDS Abuse, S3 Leaks, Container Escape | [AWS](../enumeration/cloud/aws.md) |
| **Wireless/IoT** | WPA2 Cracking, BLE Exploits, RFID Cloning | [Wireless](wireless.md) |
| **Social/Physical** | Phishing, Vishing, USB Drops, Tailgating | [Social Engineering](social-engineering.md) |

subheadings.heading: Top CWE Reference
subheadings.content:
| CWE ID | Name | Documentation Link |
|---|---|---|
| **CWE-78** | OS Command Injection | [Command Injection](../enumeration/web/command-injection.md) |
| **CWE-79** | Cross-site Scripting (XSS) | [XSS](../enumeration/web/xss.md) |
| **CWE-89** | SQL Injection | [SQLi](../enumeration/web/sqli.md) |
| **CWE-918** | SSRF | [SSRF](../enumeration/web/ssrf.md) |

subheadings.heading: Attack to Defense Mapping
subheadings.content:
| Attack | Primary Detection | Core Prevention |
|---|---|---|
| **SQLi** | WAF rules, Query logging | Parameterized queries |
| **XSS** | CSP violations, WAF | Output encoding, strict CSP |
| **SSRF** | Outbound request monitoring | Allowlisting, Segmentation |
| **Pass-the-Hash** | NTLM relay detection | SMB Signing, Credential Guard |
